title: [FIRRTL][LowerToHW] Drop annotations which have no effect
body:
This change adds some more annotations to the list of annotations which
should be dropped in LowerToHW.

The `BlackBox` annotation is used to indicate which extmodule are
created from the BlackBoxReader pass and no pass is responsible for
removing it.

The `ElaborationArtefactsDirectory` specifies the output directory of a
not-implemented (and not planned) `ElaborationArtefacts` transform. In
order for this annotation to have any effect we would need a module
annotated with `ElaborationArtefactAnnotation`.

The `MetadataDirAnnotation` is used by a few passes and no
specific pass is responsible for removing it.
